_qualitativeInsights.text:
The data provided contains no usable statistics. All send counts are undefined and all reply and booking rates are null across every pattern cluster. Without actual performance numbers, I cannot identify which message approaches are working or failing, compare stage-by-stage conversion, or recommend specific changes based on evidence.

To generate actionable insights, I need complete data showing actual send volumes, reply percentages, and booking percentages for each message pattern. Please provide the full dataset with populated metrics.
